headline_seed: Trump administration retreats on 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' - Politico
draft_text:
The DOJ said Monday it will abide by a federal judge's order halting Trump's $1.8B "anti-weaponization fund."

Politico and NPR both confirm compliance — but how dead the fund is, per one official, is still "being worked on."

And that's the mews.
